2026-02-26.warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
E2MOM x 5
30 Double Unders
5 HSPU or Pike Push Ups
5 T2B
rest in time remaining
Aim for Unbroken smooth reps with fast transitions - record the time for the fastest round

gymnastics:
EMOM x 3 10 Hollow Rocks (Hold Knee if required - keep your back off the ground)
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3 (6:00)
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3 (9:00)
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3 (12:00)
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Cloth between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3 (15:00)
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 6 (18:00)
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
HSPU Progression (24:00 E1.5MOM x 6 -33:00)
A) 4-6 Kipping HSPU - Focus on expolosive Kip - Aim straight up not at the wall
B) 6 Pike HSPU
C) 20 sec HS Hold
Double Under Progression
EMOM x 8 (33:00)
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
EMOM x 5 (31:00)
Double Under attempts -
Double - single - single - single - Double
OR aim for a smooth - controlled 30 reps every 90 seconds - relaxed shoulders & breath

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, triceps, and grip via HSPU, T2B, and double unders. Build antagonists and posterior chain.

gymnastics:
EMOM x 3 10 Hollow Rocks (Hold Knee if required - keep your back off the ground)
Pull Up Progression
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Lean Back to begin Pull
Big Hip Pop
Singles - Focus on Pulling into the bar and pushing away
EMOM x 5
Jumping C2B - Pause at the bar and slow lower
- Maintain Hollow - Pull Ribs into hips
HSPU Progression
EMOM x 5
30 second HS Hold
EMOM x 3
Tripod - Lower to Target / Eccentric/ Abmat if required
E2MOM x 5
5 SHSPU Box Pike Or Pike - Aim for target
Core tight throughout

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers shoulders, core, and posterior chain; build opposing musculature and isolated leg work to balance.

10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats
Gymnastics | EMOM x 3 10 Hollow Rocks (Hold Knee if required - keep your back off the ground)
Pull Up Progression
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Lean Back to begin Pull
Big Hip Pop
Singles - Focus on Pulling into the bar and pushing away
EMOM x 5
Jumping C2B - Pause at the bar and slow lower
- Maintain Hollow - Pull Ribs into hips
HSPU Progression
EMOM x 5
30 second HS Hold
EMOM x 3
Tripod - Lower to Target / Eccentric/ Abmat if required
E2MOM x 5
5 SHSPU Box Pike Or Pike - Aim for target
Core tight throughout
Workout | 10 RFT - 15 minute cap
5 HSPU
5 C2B
10 Air squats
2026-03-05.siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: Hollow Rocks. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 5 HSPU, 5 C2B, 10 Air squats. For hypertrophy, focus on back hypertrophy (lats/rhomboids), legs (quad/glute isolation), biceps.

metcon.name: CrossFit Games Open 26.2 Scaled (Ages 15-54)
metcon.description:
For Time:
80-foot dumbbell overhead walking lunge
20 alternating dumbbell snatches
20 jumping pull-ups
80-foot dumbbell overhead walking lunge
20 alternating dumbbell snatches
20 pull-ups
80-foot dumbbell overhead walking lunge
20 alternating dumbbell snatches
20 chest-to-bar pull-ups
Time cap: 15 minutes
F:
20-lb (10-kg) dumbbell, jumping pull-ups, then pull-ups, then chest-to-bar pull-ups
M:
35-lb (15-kg) dumbbell, jumping pull-ups, then pull-ups, then chest-to-bar pull-ups
*If capped, record rep count in the comment box

hypertrophy.reasoning: Posterior chain and arm hypertrophy complements today's quad/shoulder/pull emphasis without competing for recovery resources.
